primary_topic: Why Doors Stick in Las Vegas
answer_summary: Las Vegas homes sit over alluvial soils with caliche layers, and when runoff or irrigation hits unevenly, you can get tiny differential movement that shows up first at door frames: rub marks at the latch side, a top corner bind
